name: @ezark/agentdesk-mcp
description: MCP server for adversarial AI output review. LLM-as-Judge quality control for any AI pipeline — review, score, and validate AI-generated content, code, and data.

scripts.postbuild: grep -q '^#!/usr/bin/env node' dist/index.js || (echo '#!/usr/bin/env node' | cat - dist/index.js > /tmp/agentdesk-mcp-shebang.js && mv /tmp/agentdesk-mcp-shebang.js dist/index.js) && chmod +x dist/index.js

author: EZARK Consulting Inc.
